title: rubus lejeunei var. carneiflorus
intro: Rubus lejeunei var. carneiflorus, also known as red- or pink-flowered raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus lejeunei plant, a type of flowering raspberry native to the southern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lejeunei var. carneiflorus are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant may be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
